flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Compton College are 19% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.2k vs $42.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Compton College fell 29% between 2009 and 2010 (4.8% → 3.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Compton College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (63.4% → 50.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Compton College rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $3.9k).
